data.en: Which food do you often eat?
data.hint: 用 which 引导特殊疑问句，often 放在行为动词之前。

data.en: What do you know about food groups?
data.cn: 关于食物类别你知道些什么？
data.hint: 用 know about 表达“了解”，food groups 意为“食物类别”。

data.en: Don't take too much!
data.hint: 否定祈使句以 Don't 开头，too much 饰不可数概念/动作。

data.en: You should have some vegetables.
data.hint: 情态动词 should 后接动词原形，some 饰可数名词复数。

data.en: We should eat all the food on our plates.
data.cn: 我们应该吃光我们盘子里的所有食物。
data.hint: on our plates 意为“在我们盘子里”，all the food 意为“所有的食物”。
accept: On our plates, we should eat all the food.
We should eat all the food on plates of ours.

data.en: You should have some fruit and vegetables.
data.cn: 你应该吃一些水果和蔬菜。
data.hint: fruit 和 vegetables 可以用 and 连接，some 修饰两者。
accept: You should have some vegetables and fruit.

data.en: Don't eat too much meat!
data.hint: 肉 meat 是不可数名词，用 too much 修饰。

data.en: I eat noodles and vegetables for lunch.
data.hint: for lunch 意为“作为午饭”，放在句末。
accept: I eat vegetables and noodles for lunch.
For lunch, I eat noodles and vegetables.
For lunch, I eat vegetables and noodles.

data.en: You should eat some meat and fruit, too.
data.cn: 你也应该吃一些肉和水果。
data.hint: too 用于肯定句末表示“也”，前面用逗号隔开。
accept: You should eat some fruit and meat, too.

data.en: That's enough!
data.hint: That's enough. 是 That is enough. 的缩写。

data.en: This is a bad day for me again!
data.cn: 这对我来说又是糟糕的一天！
data.hint: for me 意为“对我来说”，again 意为“再次”。

data.en: Every morning, you need a good breakfast.
data.cn: 每天早晨，你需要一顿丰盛的早餐。
data.hint: Every morning 做时间状语放句首，need a good breakfast 意为“需要一顿好早餐”。
accept: You need a good breakfast every morning.

data.en: Let's have bread, milk, eggs, fruit and vegetables.
data.cn: 让我们吃面包、牛奶、鸡蛋、水果和蔬菜。
data.hint: Let's 后面接动词原形，多项并列时用逗号隔开，最后一项前加 and。
accept: Let's have bread, milk, fruit, eggs and vegetables.
Let's have bread, eggs, milk, fruit and vegetables.
Let's have bread, eggs, fruit, milk and vegetables.
Let's have bread, fruit, milk, eggs and vegetables.
Let's have bread, fruit, eggs, milk and vegetables.

data.en: Just a few biscuits are not enough!
data.cn: 仅仅几块饼干是不够的！
data.hint: a few 修饰可数名词复数 biscuits，谓语用 are。

data.en: I often feel hungry all morning.
data.cn: 我经常整个上午都感到饥饿。
data.hint: often 频度副词，放在系动词 feel 之前，all morning 意为“整个上午”。
accept: All morning, I often feel hungry.

data.en: Then you often eat too much for lunch.
data.cn: 然后你午饭经常吃得太多。
data.hint: too much 意为“太多”，for lunch 意为“作为午饭”。
accept: Then, for lunch, you often eat too much.
Then you often eat too much lunch.
Then you eat too much for lunch often.

data.en: You have a lot of meat, but no vegetables and no fruit.
data.cn: 你吃了许多肉，但没有蔬菜也没有水果。
data.hint: a lot of 饰不可数/可数名词，but 表转折，no 饰名词表示“没有”。
accept: You have a lot of meat, but no fruit and no vegetables.

data.en: I get too heavy.
data.hint: get 是系动词“变得”，too 修饰形容词 heavy。

data.en: This makes you sleepy in the afternoon.
data.cn: 这让你在下午感到困倦。
data.hint: make sb. adj. 意为“使某人怎样”，in the afternoon 是下午的时间状语。
accept: In the afternoon, this makes you sleepy.

data.en: And you always eat dinner too fast so you can go and play.
data.cn: 而且你总是晚饭吃得太快，以便能去玩耍。
data.hint: so 引导目的/结果状语从句，can go and play 意为“可以去玩耍”。
accept: And you always eat dinner too fast so you can play and go.

data.en: You should eat slowly.
data.hint: should 情态动词后接动词原形，slowly 副词修饰动词 eat。

data.en: I have to work hard for a long time after dinner.
data.cn: 晚饭后我不得不努力工作很长时间。
data.hint: have to 意为“不得不”，for a long time 表示“很长一段时间”，after dinner 意为“晚饭后”。
accept: After dinner, I have to work hard for a long time.

data.en: I'm so tired.
data.hint: I'm 是 I am 的缩写，so 修饰形容词 tired。

data.en: Sally, please make some changes.
data.hint: please 用于祈使句表示礼貌，make changes 意为“做出改变”。
accept: Please make some changes, Sally.

data.en: Help me stay healthy.
data.hint: help sb. do sth. 结构，stay 是系动词“保持”，后接形容词 healthy。

data.en: Then you are healthy, too.
data.hint: Then 放在句首，too 放在句末表“也”。

data.en: I'm sorry that you feel sad.
data.hint: I'm sorry that... 后面跟宾语从句表示“抱歉...”，feel 后接形容词 sad。

data.en: I should have bread and milk for breakfast.
data.cn: 我早餐应该吃面包和喝牛奶。
data.hint: have ... for breakfast 意为“早餐吃...”。
accept: I should have milk and bread for breakfast.
For breakfast, I should have bread and milk.
For breakfast, I should have milk and bread.

data.en: I should eat vegetables for lunch.
data.hint: eat ... for lunch 意为“午餐吃...”。
accept: For lunch, I should eat vegetables.

data.en: And for dinner, I should eat slowly.
data.cn: 并且晚饭时，我应该慢慢吃。
data.hint: for dinner 表示“晚饭时”，slowly 修饰 eat。
accept: And I should eat slowly for dinner.

data.en: I hope you feel happy soon.
data.cn: 我希望你很快会感到快乐。
data.hint: hope 后接宾语从句，feel happy 意为“感到快乐”，soon 意为“很快”。

data.en: Want to eat right?
data.hint: Want to do sth. 意为“想要做某事”，eat right 意为“吃得正确/健康”。

data.en: Remember three words: Go, slow, whoa!
data.hint: Remember 开头的祈使句，three words 意为“三个词”。

data.en: Tomatoes, grapes and oats help us to grow.
data.cn: 西红柿、葡萄和燕麦帮助我们成长。
data.hint: help sb. to do sth. 意为“帮助某人做某事”， grow 意为“成长”。
accept: Tomatoes, oats and grapes help us to grow.
Grapes, tomatoes and oats help us to grow.
Grapes, oats and tomatoes help us to grow.
Oats, tomatoes and grapes help us to grow.
Oats, grapes and tomatoes help us to grow.

data.en: So we can go, go, go!
data.cn: 这样我们就能不断前进！
data.hint: So 放在句首表结果，can 后接动词原形。

data.en: Don't take too much.
data.hint: 否定祈使句，take too much 意为“拿太多”。

data.en: Be slow, slow, slow!
data.hint: Be 开头的祈使句，slow 是形容词。

data.en: They make our body slow.
data.cn: 它们使我们的身体变慢。
data.hint: make sb./sth. adj. 意为“使...变...”，our body 意为“我们的身体”。

data.en: So whoa! Say no!
data.hint: Say no! 意为“说不”，表示拒绝。

data.en: Which words have the same sound?
data.cn: 哪些单词有相同的读音？
data.hint: Which words 引导特殊疑问句，the same sound 意为“相同的声音”。

data.en: What snacks do you eat?
data.hint: What snacks 引导特殊疑问句，do 为助动词。

data.en: Are they healthy?
data.hint: 主语 they 是复数，系动词用 Are，healthy 是形容词。

data.en: Eat enough of this food.
data.hint: enough of this food 意为“足够这种食物”。

data.en: Eat some of this food.
data.hint: some of this food 意为“一些这种食物”。

data.en: Eat a little of this food.
data.hint: a little 饰不可数名词，of this food 意为“这种食物”。

data.en: This is a healthy meal.
data.hint: healthy meal 意为“健康的餐食”，a 用在辅音音素开头的词前。

data.en: We should drink milk.
data.hint: should 后跟动词原形，drink milk 意为“喝牛奶”。

data.en: It's good for our bones.
data.cn: 它对我们的骨骼有好处。
data.hint: It's 是 It is 的缩写，be good for 意为“对...有好处”。

data.en: We should eat carrots.
data.hint: should 后跟动词原形，carrots 胡萝卜用复数形式。

data.en: They're good for our eyes.
data.cn: 它们对我们的眼睛有好处。
data.hint: They're 是 They are 的缩写，be good for 意为“对...有好处”。
